title: ⚡ Fastest Client
description: A lightweight competitive Minecraft client focused on optimization, smooth combat performance, and Crystal PvP.
body:
![banner fastest client](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be625b864954771fbcefb7961ee4f1e0290152a7_0.webp) # ⚡ Fastest Client ## *Competitive Performance Reinvented*

A lightweight competitive Minecraft client focused on optimization, smooth combat performance, and Crystal PvP.

--- # 🚀 Built for Competitive Performance Fastest Client is a lightweight Minecraft performance client designed to deliver smoother gameplay, stable frametimes, responsive combat, and competitive consistency across multiple Minecraft versions. Designed for: * ⚔️ PvP * 💎 Crystal PvP * 🌍 SMP * 🏆 Competitive Multiplayer * 🖥️ Every System Fastest Client combines carefully selected optimization mods, competitive utilities, and performance-focused configurations into a single streamlined experience. Whether you're fighting intense CPvP battles, grinding ranked servers, or exploring your survival world, Fastest Client keeps gameplay smooth, responsive, and distraction-free. > ### No unnecessary bloat. > > ### No complicated setup. > > ### Just install, launch, and play. --- # ✨ Why Fastest Client? ## ⚡ Smooth Performance Designed to improve: * Frametime consistency * Rendering performance * Memory efficiency * Gameplay responsiveness * Multiplayer smoothness * Long-session stability ### Included Improvements * 🚀 Faster chunk rendering * 📉 Reduced micro-stuttering * 🧠 Better memory management * ⚡ More responsive gameplay * 🌐 Improved multiplayer smoothness * 🎯 Cleaner visual clarity --- ## ⚔️ Built for Competitive PvP Fastest Client is tuned specifically for competitive gameplay and Crystal PvP. ### Competitive Features * Optimized particles * Lightweight rendering * Cleaner combat visibility * Reduced visual distractions * Useful PvP utilities * Multiplayer-focused optimizations Fastest Client prioritizes consistency during intense fights, helping maintain smooth gameplay even in crowded multiplayer environments. > Deliver a faster, cleaner, and more responsive Minecraft experience. --- # 🖥️ Optimized for Every System Designed to run efficiently on: * 💻 Low-end PCs * 🧩 Integrated Graphics * 📚 Older Laptops * 🎮 Modern Gaming Systems * ⚡ High Refresh Rate Displays ### Recommended RAM * Minimum: **2 GB** * Recommended: **3–4 GB** --- # ⚙️ Recommended Settings ## 🟢 Modern Versions (Fabric / Sodium) ### General * Render Distance: **6–8 Chunks** * Simulation Distance: **4 Chunks** * Max Framerate: **Unlimited** ### Quality * Graphics: **Fast** * Clouds: **OFF** * Particles: **Minimal** * Entity Shadows: **OFF** ### Performance Enable: * ✅ Block Face Culling * ✅ Fog Occlusion * ✅ Animate Only Visible Textures * ✅ Entity Culling --- ## 🔵 Legacy Versions (Forge / OptiFine) ### Performance Enable: * ✅ Fast Render * ✅ Fast Math * ✅ Smooth World * ✅ Dynamic Updates --- # 📥 Quick Installation 1. Open the Modrinth App 2. Search for **Fastest Client** 3. Select your preferred version 4. Allocate at least **2 GB RAM** 5. Launch and enjoy smoother gameplay --- # 👥 Credits ### ⚡ Creator & Maintainer **Tionoob19** Built with support from the open-source Minecraft optimization community. --- ## 📢 Development Notice Future updates may take longer than usual. Fastest Client is still actively maintained, but development and testing are currently limited due to temporary hardware issues. Thank you for your patience and continued support. ---

⚡ Fastest Client — Play Faster. Fight Smarter.
